zh.Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Briti: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可
zh.lifeSummary: 當Abigail Richardson於1683年11月14日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃本時，她的父親Stephen Richardson34歲，母親Abigail Wyman24歲。她於1703年3月9日與John Vinton在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1720年6月21日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可斯同哈姆享年36歲，埋葬在美國麻薩諸塞州米德萊可沃本費爾斯特 布利亞爾 格洛德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Abigail Richardson于1683年11月14日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃本时，她的父亲Stephen Richardson34岁，母亲Abigail Wyman24岁。她于1703年3月9日与John Vinton在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1720年6月21日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可斯同哈姆享年36岁，埋葬在美国马萨诸塞州米德萊可沃本費爾斯特 布利亞爾 格洛德。

nameMeanings.name: Richardson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: patronymic from the Middle English personal name Richard + -son. This surname is also very common among African Americans. Compare Ritson .
Americanized form (and a Swedish variant) of Swedish Richardsson or Rikardsson: patronymic from the personal name Richard , Rikard.
Americanized form of Norwegian and Danish Richardsen or Norwegian Rikardsen, cognates of 2 above.

variants.name: Richerson
meanings: Probably an altered form of   Richardson   or perhaps a patronymic from   Richer  .

variants.name: Richard
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Emile, Jacques, Andre, Marcel, Pierre, Leonce, Normand, Camille, Lucien, Gilles, Henri.

English, French, West Indian (mainly Haiti), German, and Dutch: from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements rīc ‘power(ful)’ + hard ‘hardy, brave, strong’. The Middle English forms were Richard and Rikard, respectively Parisian Old French and Old Picard pronunciations of the ancient Germanic name. Middle English Rikard gives rise to the pet form Rick , whilst Richard has given the pet forms Richie and Rich . Both produced rhyming pet forms, Dick and Hick for Rikard and Hitch for Richard.

History: The LA Richard families are mainly descended from Acadian refugees in the second half of the 18th century. — This surname is listed in the register of Huguenot ancestors recognized by the Huguenot Society of America.

variants.name: Richeson
meanings: Probably an altered form of   Richardson  , but compare   Richerson  .

variants.name: Ritson
meanings: variant of Richson, a shortened form of Richardson . The name may sometimes have been confused with or assimilated to Rushton .
in southern England perhaps a habitational name from Ritson, in Halwell (Devon).

nameMeanings.name: Abigail
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, meaning ‘father of exaltation’ in Hebrew, borne by one of King David's wives, who had earlier been married to Nabal (1 Samuel 25:3), and by the mother of Absalom's captain Amasa (2 Samuel 1:25). The name first came into general use in Britain in the 16th century, under Puritan influence. It was a common name in literature for a lady's maid, for example in  Beaumont  and  Fletcher's  play The Scornful Lady (  1616 ). The biblical Abigail refers to herself as ‘thy servant’ in addressing King David. In Ireland this name has traditionally been used as an Anglicized form of Gobnat , although the reasons for this are not clear. It was popular in the 17th century, especially among Puritans and Nonconformists, and has again enjoyed considerable favour since the 1990s.

meanings: Biblical name, meaning ‘father of exaltation’ in Hebrew, borne by one of King David's wives, who had earlier been married to Nabal (1 Samuel 25:3), and by the mother of Absalom's captain Amasa (2 Samuel 1:25). The name first came into general use in Britain in the 16th century, under Puritan influence. It was a common name in literature for a lady's maid, for example in  Beaumont  and  Fletcher's  play The Scornful Lady (  1616 ). The biblical Abigail refers to herself as ‘thy servant’ in addressing King David. In Ireland this name has traditionally been used as an Anglicized form of Gobnat , although the reasons for this are not clear. It was popular in the 17th century, especially among Puritans and Nonconformists, and has again enjoyed considerable favour since the 1990s.

en.lifeSummary: When Abigail Richardson was born on 14 November 1683, in Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, her father, Stephen Richardson, was 34 and her mother, Abigail Wyman, was 24. She married John Vinton on 9 March 1703, in Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 21 June 1720, in Stoneham, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 36, and was buried in First Burial Ground, Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts, United States.

Elle a épousé John Vinton le 9 mars 1703, à Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles. de.lifeSummary: Als Abigail Richardson am 14. November 1683 in Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Stephen Richardson 34 und ihre Mutter Abigail Wyman 24. Sie hat am 9. März 1703 in Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America John Vinton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 21. Juni 1720 im Alter von 36 Jahren in Stoneham, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in First Burial Ground, Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Abigail Richardsonが1683年11月14日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスウオブルンで生まれた時，父Stephen Richardsonは34歳，母Abigail Wymanは24歳であった。1703年3月9日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースフォルクでJohn Vintonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1720年6月21日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスストーネハムで36歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州ミッドレセックスウオブルンフィルスト ブリアル グロウンドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Abigail Richardson(이)가 1683년 11월 14일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 보번에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Stephen Richardson(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Abigail Wyman(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1703년 3월 9일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크에서 John Vinton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1720년 6월 21일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 스톤함에서 36세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 매사추세츠 주 미들레세스 보번 피르스트 버이앨 그라운드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Abigail Richardson nasceu em 14 de novembro de 1683, em Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, seu pai, Stephen Richardson, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Abigail Wyman, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com John Vinton em 9 de março de 1703, em Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 21 de junho de 1720, em Stoneham, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 36 anos, e foi sepultada em First Burial Ground, Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Abigail Richardson родилась 14 ноября 1683 г. в местности вобурн, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика, её отцу по имени Stephen Richardson было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Abigail Wyman, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Vinton 9 марта 1703 г. в местности суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла 21 июня 1720 г. в местности стоунэам, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 36 лет и была похоронена в местности фирст буряль гроунд, вобурн, миддлесекс, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Abigail Richardson nació el 14 de noviembre de 1683, en Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, su papá, Stephen Richardson, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Abigail Wyman, tenía 24 años. Se casó con John Vinton el 9 de marzo de 1703, en Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 21 de junio de 1720, en Stoneham, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 36 años, y fue sepultada en First Burial Ground, Woburn, Middlesex, Masachusets, Estados Unidos.
